title: Require Public Domain Surfaces In Tests
forbids: test files deep-importing domain internals instead of public domain surfaces
why: Tests should exercise domain contracts through the same public surfaces as product code unless an explicit architecture decision owns a deeper reach.
remediate: Replace each violating test import with a public domain surface only after the corresponding domain public surface exists. Do not widen domain public surfaces just to satisfy tests; operation-internal white-box tests require their own topology decision.
message: Use @mapgen/domain/<domain>, /ops, /artifacts, /model/schemas, /model/policy, or approved /model/data collections from tests instead of domain internals.
